results.title: Acme Corp SA - Commercial Registry Extract
results.snippet: Acme Corp SA, registered on 15 March 2010, Registration No. CHE-123.456.789. Registered office: Bahnhofstrasse 42, 8001 Zürich, Switzerland. Purpose: Financial services, asset management, and investment advisory.

results.title: Acme Corp SA Annual Report 2023
results.snippet: Board of Directors: Hans Mueller (Chairman), Maria Schmidt (CEO), Pierre Dubois (CFO). The company maintains subsidiaries in Luxembourg and Singapore.

results.title: Ownership Structure Filing
results.snippet: Ultimate Beneficial Owners: Mueller Family Trust (45%), Schmidt Holdings AG (30%), Public shareholders (25%). Mueller Family Trust is controlled by Hans Mueller (Swiss national, DOB 1965).

results.title: FINMA Licensed Institutions Register
results.snippet: Acme Corp SA holds a securities dealer license (Category 2) issued by FINMA on 01 July 2012. License status: Active. Last supervision date: December 2023.

results.title: Acme Corp SA Annual Report 2023
results.snippet: The company received no regulatory sanctions during the reporting period. Internal audit found no material compliance deficiencies.

results.title: Swiss Financial News - Regulatory Updates
results.snippet: In 2019, Acme Corp SA received a warning letter from FINMA regarding delayed suspicious activity reporting. The company has since enhanced its compliance procedures.

results.title: OFAC Sanctions Search Results
results.snippet: Search performed for: Acme Corp SA, Hans Mueller, Maria Schmidt, Pierre Dubois, Mueller Family Trust, Schmidt Holdings AG. No matches found in OFAC SDN List.

results.title: Internal Risk Assessment Framework
results.snippet: Financial services companies in Switzerland with securities dealer licenses carry moderate inherent risk. Key factors: jurisdiction risk (low for Switzerland), product complexity (medium), client base diversity.

results.title: Swiss Financial News - Regulatory Updates
results.snippet: In 2019, Acme Corp SA received a warning letter from FINMA regarding delayed suspicious activity reporting. The company has since enhanced its compliance procedures.

results.title: Ownership Structure Filing
results.snippet: Ultimate Beneficial Owners: Mueller Family Trust (45%), Schmidt Holdings AG (30%), Public shareholders (25%). Mueller Family Trust is controlled by Hans Mueller (Swiss national, DOB 1965).

results.title: Acme Corp SA Website - About Us
results.snippet: Acme Corp SA provides wealth management, investment advisory, and securities trading services to institutional and high-net-worth clients across Europe and Asia.

results.title: Acme Corp SA Annual Report 2023
results.snippet: Revenue breakdown: Asset Management (45%), Securities Trading (35%), Advisory Services (20%). Total AUM: CHF 2.3 billion. Client composition: 60% institutional, 40% private clients.
